title: Server terminates upon UPDATE
poc: insert into blobtest values(cast('00' as blob));
update blobtest set b=cast(cast(b as text)||cast(b as text) as blob);
key_bug_features: UPDATE operation on blob data type causes server termination
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE blobtest(b blob, id int PRIMARY KEY);
INSERT INTO blobtest VALUES(cast('00' as blob), 1);
INSERT INTO blobtest VALUES(cast('01' as blob), 2);
UPDATE blobtest SET b = cast(cast(b as text) || ' appended' as blob) WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE blobtest SET b = NULL WHERE id = 2;
